name: Legends Draft Haus & Sports Bar
address: 2118 Harrison Dr Suite B, Clinton, IA 52732
about: Legends Draft Haus & Sports Bar is a multifaceted venue in Clinton, Iowa, combining a sports bar environment with gaming amenities including a pool hall and golf simulators. It features one of the largest and most modern spaces in Eastern Iowa, designed for a social and relaxed atmosphere. The venue offers a full bar, extensive food menu, and event hosting capabilities, making it a versatile destination for dining, casual play, and social gatherings. Patrons can enjoy authentic bar food and craft beers while engaging in various leisure activities, from sports simulations to competitive tournaments, all within a single, well-maintained location.
why_golfers_like_it: Social atmosphere with food and drinks available
Affordable access to golf simulation alongside other leisure activities
Ideal for casual play and post-game socializing

food_and_drink.notes: Large menu with appetizers, entrees, wings, pizzas, and baskets. Online ordering available.
Full bar with 31 craft beers, tall boys, cocktails, and wine.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food is allowed for an additional price, but all alcohol must be purchased at the bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific time estimates for 18 holes; it is best to call the venue for details.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Legends Draft Haus & Sports Bar is family-friendly and hosts events like birthday parties.
